name: Yuhao Zhang
subtitle: Building production-grade applications with Java, Spring Boot, React and AI-powered development tools.

projects.title: Intelligent BI Platform
projects.problem: Traditional BI tools require manual chart configuration and lack natural language interaction, making data analysis slow and inaccessible to non-technical users.
projects.solution: Built an AI-powered platform that accepts natural language queries, automatically generates appropriate chart types, and provides interactive data visualization.
projects.implementation: Designed a Spring Boot backend with RESTful APIs for data ingestion and AI service orchestration. The React frontend renders dynamic charts based on AI-returned configurations. MySQL stores user queries and generated chart metadata.
projects.learning: Learned how to design a clean API layer between AI services and frontend rendering. Understood the tradeoffs between server-side chart generation vs client-side rendering. Got hands-on experience with async task processing.
projects.impact: Reduced chart generation time from minutes to seconds with natural language input.
projects.description: An AI-powered Business Intelligence platform capable of intelligent chart generation, data visualization and natural language data analysis.

projects.title: Coming Soon
projects.description: More projects are on the way. Stay tuned.

services.title: React & TypeScript

services.title: AI Coding
services.description: Leveraging AI tools like Cursor and Codex to accelerate development workflows.

aboutpara: I'm an undergraduate student at Southwest University of Science and Technology, majoring in Information Management and Information System. My focus is on Java full-stack development — building backend services with Spring Boot, crafting frontend interfaces with React, and integrating AI-powered tools into my workflow. I'm particularly interested in how AI Coding can reshape the way we build software.

resume.tagline: 👋 I'm a Java Full Stack Developer exploring AI Coding.
resume.description: Undergraduate student focused on building full-stack applications with Java, Spring Boot, and React. Passionate about integrating AI tools into modern development workflows.

experiences.position: Intelligent BI Platform — Full Stack Developer
experiences.bullets: Designed and implemented an AI-powered BI platform with intelligent chart generation, Built RESTful APIs with Spring Boot and integrated AI services for natural language data analysis

education.universityName: Southwest University of Science and Technology
education.universityPara: Bachelor's degree in Information Management and Information System. Focused on software engineering, database systems, and full-stack web development.
